description_long: This object is a medium-sized pumpkin with a smooth, rounded body and a segmented surface, colored in a warm orange hue. The pumpkin features a tall, angular brown stem protruding from the top center. On one side, a menacing face is carved into the pumpkin, with sharply angled eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The carved sections reveal a lighter, yellowish interior, suggesting the pumpkin is hollowed out. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is unadorned, with visible ridges running vertically from the stem to the base. There are no additional decorations or accessories attached to the pumpkin.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a tall brown stem and a sinister jack-o'-lantern face, featuring sharp eyes and a jagged mouth.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is seen from the back, showing its smooth, segmented orange surface and the tall brown stem, with no carvings visible.
description_view_1: A side view reveals part of the carved face, with the edge of an eye and mouth cutout visible, along with the stem and smooth body.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full carved jack-o'-lantern face, including sharp eyes and a jagged mouth, as well as the prominent stem.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the other edge of the carved face, with the rest of the pumpkin's surface smooth and uncarved.
attribute_carving_pattern: The pumpkin is carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, featuring two sharply angled, slanted eyes and a wide, jagged mouth with pointed teeth. The design is simple and menacing, with no additional motifs or surface etchings beyond the facial features.
